Okay, it's 365 days exactly one year since you first made contact. Today you're going to call and say this, clearly you can see I'm not going away. Is there any way we could consummate this on the anniversary, the 12-month anniversary of me meeting you? I want you to be direct, I want you to be clear, concise, and I want you to ask for the business. Remember it takes five to 12 times to close most of your contacts. Today is a one-year anniversary, take advantage of it. Now from here I want you to recycle back. You have plenty of reasons, opportunities, use your own creativity here, and you can also at any time call up 310-777-0255 and ask us questions about what you might do today if you're between any of these calls that I've given you thus far.
